[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110000 2
1 0000100 1
2 0100010 2
3 0100000 1
4 0001100 2
5 0101000 2
6 0100110 3
7 0100000 1

47 74 0100000 1 match 3 7
